Title: Good First Issue — [Short task title]

Description:
- What to implement: short clear steps
- Expected input/output
- Suggested tech: Node/TypeScript or Python
- Time estimate: 2-8 hours

Example:
- Implement endpoint `GET /v1/health` that returns { status: "ok" }.

How to test:
- curl http://localhost:3000/v1/health

Labels:
- good-first-issue
